# FOMC decision-day dates (SCHEDULED meetings only, final/statement day), 2010 - June 2026.
# Collected 2026-07-17 via WebFetch of federalreserve.gov (verified page-by-page, NOT from memory):
#   https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomchistorical2010.htm  ... fomchistorical2020.htm  (one page per year, 2010-2020)
#   https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm       (2021-2026)
# EXCLUDED (unscheduled meetings / conference calls / notation votes, per the Fed's own labels):
#   2010-05-09, 2010-10-15, 2011-08-01, 2011-11-28, 2013-10-16, 2014-03-04, 2019-10-04,
#   2020-03-02, 2020-03-15 (emergency), 2020-03-19/23/31 + 2020-08-27 (notation votes), 2025-08-22 (notation vote).
# NOTE: 2020 has only 7 scheduled decision days - the Mar 17-18 2020 scheduled meeting was CANCELLED
#   (replaced by the unscheduled Mar 15 emergency meeting, excluded above). All other years: 8.
# One-day scheduled meetings (2010-2012 era) use the meeting day itself as the decision day.
